title: POST endpoint without CSRF token
description: State-changing POST endpoint without CSRF protection.
remediation: Add CSRF middleware: app.use(csrf({ cookie: { sameSite: 'strict' } }))

title: PUT/DELETE endpoint without CSRF token
description: State-changing PUT/DELETE/PATCH endpoint without CSRF protection.
remediation: Add CSRF middleware or use SameSite=Strict cookies

title: Session cookie without SameSite attribute
description: Session cookie set without SameSite attribute, relying on browser defaults.
remediation: Set SameSite=Strict or SameSite=Lax on session cookies

title: HTML form without CSRF hidden field
description: HTML form with POST method lacks a CSRF token hidden field.
remediation: Add a hidden CSRF token field to all POST forms
